series_metadata.series_title: Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee Application / Agreement
series_metadata.series_description: Records contain all current Key Gaming Employee Applications and Agreements. Each Video Lottery Termina Key Gaming Employee Application and Agreement identifies the name, address, personal information, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770 and applicants notarized signature. The Application and Agreement is used for approval of Video Lottery Termina Key Gaming Employee to sell Ohio Lottery products. Files are maintained within rotary file, in numerical Agent Number order.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: copy in a secure area with access limited only persons who need records carry out their duties and responsibilities (which is continually updated and maintained duration of active Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee License). Upon license cancellation, records are moved Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee Application / Agreement Schedule 950-0910
